Inazuma has several policies, including the Acceptable Use Policy (AUP), Data Protection and Privacy Policy, Password Policy, Leave Policy, Performance Management Policy, Risk Management Policy, Companies Act Policy, Policy on Prevention of Sexual Harassment (POSH), and Occupational Health and Safety Policy.
